The '''Battle of Formos''' was a battle in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] won with their [[Scorpenek annihilator droid/Legends|Colicoid Annihilator Droid]]s.
